name: Dutch
yearOfTurn: 1626, aboard a vessel crossing the Atlantic
motivation: Originally: establish a trade empire in the New World. After transformation: survive with conscience intact, build something meaningful from an eternal life he did not choose.
coreConflict: Dutch does not want to be a monster. He imposes strict rules on himself regarding human feeding — rules that the gameplay regularly tests and occasionally breaks.
personality: Methodical, mercantile, deeply private. Centuries of observation have made him a brilliant reader of human nature and political power. He is not cruel. He is, however, ruthlessly pragmatic.
arc: From terrified, newly-turned outcast to the most powerful entity on the most powerful island in the world — and the question of whether that power has cost him his humanity.
